manifest.author: Mark
manifest.description: This is a enhancing mindmap plugin for Obsidian. You can edit mindmap on markdown.
manifest.name: Enhancing Mindmap

releases.description:

thank for @zhao414

notice: this version for obsidian 1.4.0 , if you use obsidian v1.3.7 , please not update to this version


注意：该版本支持 ob 1.4.0 以上版本，如果您使用的是 ob 1.4.0 以下的版本，请不要更新到该版本

releases.author: MarkMindCkm
releases.description:
1. fix https://github.com/MarkMindCkm/obsidian-markmind/issues/184
2. merge feature request https://github.com/MarkMindCkm/obsidian-enhancing-mindmap/pull/61
3. support import text from xmind zen file （支持导入xmind zen 文件）

----

If you need more stronger mind mapping and PDF annotation functions , you can try my another plugin : [obsidian markmind](https://github.com/MarkMindCkm/obsidian-markmind)

- support summary
- support freenode
- support node group
- support relate link
- support pdf annotate
- support more layout 
  - table layout
  - fish layout
  - tree layout
- support import highlight annotations from pdf
- support commit the annotations and highlights to the PDF
- support mobile and pc

如果您需要更强大的思维导图和pdf标注功能，可以尝试一下我的另一个插件 [obsidian markmind](https://github.com/MarkMindCkm/obsidian-markmind)

----
#### support import xmind zen file 
![import xmind zen](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/18719494/154793275-9d0ba147-a718-4c41-a7b1-81808cb6e4aa.gif)
----
---
#### markmind 
##### import annotations from pdf  (支持导入pdf文件中高亮标注)
![12345678](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/18719494/153593116-5a725dfc-70f0-4a17-a9ad-3c2bccb70f99.gif)
##### pdf annotate  （pdf 标注功能）
![pdf](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/18719494/152282005-8f00b132-018d-4154-b4b9-0b4d334623a7.gif)
##### mind map 
###### `basic mode`  （`basic` 模式的一些功能演示）
![](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/18719494/138630597-fc2396d1-c818-43dc-83eb-fa638d8a0028.gif)
![](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/18719494/150626028-8d8733d5-8cd2-4eaf-b369-73ebbbcc5244.gif)

###### `rich mode`  （`rich` 模式的一些功能演示）
![](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/18719494/130028629-1a1e448d-32b9-4201-b152-1ad09439e18e.gif)
![](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/18719494/147195606-3a270e5e-2628-4322-bd87-9ef6d1004b66.gif)

###### mobile pdf annotate  (移动端 pdf 批注功能)
https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/18719494/154784360-9a502fe8-843c-416f-8d56-b895bdad6399.mp4
releases.name: v0.2.2

releases.author: MarkMindCkm
releases.description:
fix export to html bug when collapse node

- notice ,when export mindmap, image in mindmap must be local
- support export mathematical formula ，but more tests are needed
- not support mobile


fix #51 


----

修复当有折叠节点时导出html问题

导出时要注意的是
- 注意，思维导图引用图片必须是本地的，否则可能出错
- 不要有空链接
- 目前支持导出公式，但需要更多的测试
- 导出功能最好在电脑端使用，对移动端的支持可能不太好

修复 #51 

---


![1234](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/18719494/146305188-67ee5292-65a3-4e49-801f-bc21de246314.gif)
releases.name: v0.2.1

releases.author: MarkMindCkm
releases.description:
add `export mindmap to html` command ( ctrl + p ) , it is a image in fact ，the default export is colorless image , you can set up background in setting tab
- notice , image in mindmap must be local
- support export mathematical formula ，but more tests are needed
- not support mobile


---

添加支持导出思维导图为html文件命令（ctrl + p），其本质是个图片, 默认导出是无底色的图片，你可以在设置页面设置背景色
- 注意，思维导图引用图片必须是本地的，否则可能出错
- 不要有空链接
- 目前支持导出公式，但需要更多的测试
- 导出功能最好在电脑端使用，对移动端的支持可能不太好

----

![1](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/18719494/146158149-75f30873-ac19-43e8-bda7-a26f824853e9.gif)

![2](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/18719494/146158165-be86e742-1910-41ea-a911-7bea88d7df44.gif)
releases.name: v0.2.0

releases.author: MarkMindCkm
releases.description:
1. add command `copy` and `paste` node (ctrl + p) , support copy and paste node
2. add `Clockwise` layout , you can select in setting tab , thanks to @cwfryer  


---


1. 在命令中添加复制和粘贴，支持节点复制和粘贴
2. 添加一个  `Clockwise` 布局，在设置页面选择，感谢 @cwfryer 


![test](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/18719494/145580340-3cc95844-d471-4b39-aaf4-73342114f84c.gif)
releases.name: v0.1.9

releases.author: MarkMindCkm
releases.description:
fix #34 , Save the state of collapsed branches  , thanks to @anta-semenov

fix sometimes parse md error due to code blocks

修复 #34 ，保存分支折叠状态，感谢 @anta-semenov
修复某些情况下代码块引起的解析markdown文件错误
releases.name: v0.1.8

releases.author: MarkMindCkm
releases.description:
fix #40 fix #17 add command `toggle markdown/mindmap mode` fix #28


-------- Please allow me to introduce my another plugin `obsidian-markmind` `obsidian-markmind` is base on this project , and in addition to these functions, it is also pointed out that , it support `rich` mode : - add summary - add boundary - add relate link - add free node - pdf annotate - relate annotate and node if you interest in it , you can try it https://github.com/MarkMindCkm/obsidian-markmind ------ 请允许我介绍我的另一款插件obsidian markmind 它是建立在本插件基础之上的，除了本插件所有功能之外，它还支持`rich`模式， - 添加归纳节点 - 添加外框 - 添加联系线 - 添加自由节点 - 支持pdf文档标注 - 添加标注和节点之间的引用 如果您对markmind感兴趣，您可以尝试一下 https://github.com/MarkMindCkm/obsidian-markmind
releases.name: v0.1.7
